sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 66:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 66:1
items.html: The term “Spirituality” that is presented in books of Kabbalah means that it is devoid of any corporeal occurrences, meaning time, place, imagination, etc. Sometimes, it indicates only the upper light in the vessel, although a vessel is also spiritual in every sense.
